recent_updates.title: MCP 2023 Amendments
recent_updates.description: MassDEP finalized updates to the Massachusetts Contingency Plan (MCP) addressing changes to soil and groundwater cleanup standards.

documents.title: Massachusetts Contingency Plan (MCP) — 310 CMR 40.0000
documents.description: The primary regulation governing assessment and cleanup of oil and hazardous material releases in Massachusetts. Establishes cleanup standards, timelines, and the Licensed Site Professional (LSP) program.

documents.title: Reportable Conditions & Release Notification (310 CMR 40.0300)
documents.description: MassDEP requirements for reporting releases of oil and hazardous material, including thresholds, timeframes, and responsible party obligations under the MCP.

documents.title: Licensed Site Professional (LSP) Program
documents.description: Overview of Massachusetts's LSP licensure system. LSPs oversee and certify site assessment and cleanup activities under the MCP. Analogous to CT's LEP.

documents.title: MA EPA MS4 General Permit (2016)
documents.description: EPA-issued MS4 General Permit for Massachusetts municipalities. Requires Stormwater Management Plans addressing six minimum control measures. MassDEP is the co-permitting authority.

documents.title: Construction General Permit (CGP) — Massachusetts
documents.description: EPA-issued general permit for construction sites disturbing 1+ acres in Massachusetts. Requires a Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan (SWPPP) and compliance with applicable effluent limits.

documents.title: Massachusetts Stormwater Handbook
documents.description: MassDEP's primary guidance for post-construction stormwater management. Sets BMP design standards, sizing methods, and performance requirements referenced in permits and local bylaws.

documents.title: MCP Phase I / II Initial Site Investigation
documents.description: Under the MCP, the Initial Site Investigation (ISI) and Comprehensive Site Assessment (CSA) serve as Phase I/II analogs. The LSP determines whether a release has occurred and characterizes site conditions.

documents.title: MassDEP Site Search — Release Tracking System (BWSC)
documents.description: Online database to search for reported releases, cleanup status, and site files under the MCP. Maintained by MassDEP Bureau of Waste Site Cleanup (BWSC).
